{{Quote|Well, we ''do'' need two twin ''M-class fighters'' down there. But one of them has a busted ''navicom'', and the ''hydroboosters'' aren't on auto. It needs a ''copilot''.|A [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Rebel Fleet]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]], to [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|<ref name="AVS" />}}
The '''M-class fighter''' was a large [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

==Characteristics==
{{Quote|You had to come run the navicom. Damn it—''I'' could have flown and handled the navigation ''myself''...|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], to [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]|<ref name="AVS" />}}
The M-class fighter was formed by a central fuselage with two angular [[Wing (technology)|wings]] attached at the center. Each wing was tipped with a [[Heavy laser cannon/Legends|heavy laser cannon]] and used large [[Engine/Legends|engine]] nacelles salvaged from wrecked [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing starfighters]].<ref name="TCSWE" />

The central fuselage's tip contained a large two-seat [[Cockpit/Legends|cockpit]]. While the [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] could be flown by a single [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], a co-pilot could embark to manage the [[Navigation computer/Legends|navigation computer]] and secondary systems.<ref name="AVS" />

==History==
{{Quote|I could have ''tried'' a few things. I would've fired the ''tow cables'' and flown us in, in ''tandem''. I could have flown ''under'' him and fired a booster that would've buoyed his ship before it crashed. But I couldn't pull ''anything'' as ''risky'' as that with ''you'' onboard.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], to [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]|<ref name="AVS" />}}
[[File:Mclassinflight.jpg|thumb|left|235px|A pair of M-class [[Starfighter/Legends|fighters]] descend from the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]] above [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]]]
M-class fighters were stationed at [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] on [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].<ref name="TCSWE" /> One was ferried to the surface by [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]]. A second, piloted by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and copiloted by [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], was severely damaged during an ice storm and crashed. Solo and Organa were forced to spend the night in the downed vessel until Chewbacca, [[Beta Omega]] and another [[Rebel pilot/Legends|Rebel pilot]] rescued them.<ref name="AVS" />

==Appearances==
*''[[A Valentine Story]]'' {{1st}}
